smsTemplates.rem2En:
Dear {Mgeni},

This is a respectful reminder to complete your pending outstanding contribution balance to support our event "{Tukio}".

Balance Due: TZS {Balance}

Thank you sincerely for your generosity.
smsTemplates.rem2Sw:
Ndugu {Mgeni},

Tunakukumbusha kwa heshima kabisa kukamilisha ahadi yako ya mchango kwa ajili ya kufanikisha tukio la {Tukio}.

Salio linalobaki: TZS {Balance}

Asante sana kwa ukarimu wako.
smsTemplates.pledge1En:
Hello {Mgeni},

We kindly request you to confirm your pledge contribution for the event "{Tukio}".

Thank you very much!
smsTemplates.pledge1Sw:
Habari {Mgeni},

Tunakuomba kuweka na kuthibitisha ahadi yako ya mchango kwa ajili ya tukio la {Tukio}.

{Kiungo}

Asante sana!
smsTemplates.pledge2En:
Dear {Mgeni},

We would be honored by your support in planning our upcoming event "{Tukio}".

Thank you deeply.
smsTemplates.pledge2Sw:
Ndugu {Mgeni},

Tunapokea kwa furaha ahadi za michango kwa ajili ya maandalizi ya tukio la {Tukio}.

Asante muno.
smsTemplates.thanks1En:
Hello {Mgeni},

We would like to thank you with immense gratitude for fully completing your contribution pledge for our event "{Tukio}".

Thank you so much and God bless you!
smsTemplates.thanks1Sw:
Habari {Mgeni},

Tunakushukuru kwa upendo mkubwa kwa kukamilisha mchango wako kikamilifu kwa ajili ya kufanikisha tukio letu la {Tukio}.

Asante sana na Mungu akubariki!
smsTemplates.thanks2En:
Dear {Mgeni},

We have successfully recorded your contribution in full.

Your presence and priceless support are deeply appreciated as they play a huge role in making "{Tukio}" a reality.

Blessings to you!
smsTemplates.thanks2Sw:
Ndugu {Mgeni},

Tujasajili and tumepokea mchango wako kikamilifu.

Tunathamini sana mchango wako na support yako ya hali ya juu katika kufanikisha tukio letu la {Tukio}.

Ubarikiwe sana muno!
